games.name: Endless Runner
games.description: Dodge obstacles and collect magnetic power-ups as speed increases.
games.controls: A/D or Arrow Keys to switch lanes. Space or Touch Button to jump.

games.name: 3D Car Racing Game
games.description: Race against active AI opponents on a modular neon racing circuit with drift physics and nitro boosts.
games.controls: W/S for Gas/Brake, A/D to steer, Shift to trigger Nitro.

games.name: Zombie Survival Shooter
games.description: Defend yourself against creeping waves of low-poly zombies with dynamic pathfinding.
games.controls: W/A/S/D to move, Mouse to aim & Left Click to shoot. Backspace/R to reload.

games.name: 3D Maze Escape Game
games.description: Explore procedures of fully randomized 3D mazes under dynamic shadow fog to locate the locked gate key.
games.controls: W/A/S/D or Arrows to explore. Viewport adapts automatically.

games.name: Space Shooter Game
games.description: Blast through asteroid belts and wave-based alien fighters to challenge the final Boss mothership.
games.controls: W/A/S/D or Mouse to navigate spaceship, Space or Auto-fire to shoot lasers.
